results.rendered_html:
gandharvapura (ga˚ + pu˚) n. Fata Morgana  VARĀH. BṚH. 45,4 . 46,25 (26) . bhānorudaye yadi vāstamaye gandharvapurapratimā dhvajinī . bimbaṃ niruṇaddhi tadā nṛpateḥ prāptaṃ samaraṃ sabhayaṃ pravadet .. 96,13 . kvacittu gandharvapuraṃ prapaśyati kvacitkvaciccāśurayolmukagraham  BHĀG. P. 5,13,3 .
— Vgl. gandharvanagara.
